name: @joe-sh/knowledge-tools-mcp
description: Knowledge vault MCP server: run it over stdio (`npx @joe-sh/knowledge-tools-mcp`) for a local/Cowork setup, or as the Docker HTTP service exposing a Streamable HTTP MCP endpoint (/mcp) and a REST API (/api/v1). Auth is off by default — deploy the HTTP surface behind an authenticating reverse proxy, or enable built-in token validation.
